description_long: This is a rugged, black laptop with a robust, industrial design, featuring a large display with multiple digital interface panels and a circular, high-tech central graphic. The keyboard is full-sized with prominent, raised keys and a visible touchpad area, while the upper bezel houses several ports and what appears to be a handle for portability. The back of the device displays a large vent, a battery compartment, and visible wiring, suggesting a focus on durability and field use. The left and right sides show reinforced corners and additional wiring, further emphasizing its rugged construction. The laptop's exterior is primarily matte black with metallic and plastic elements, and the screen is illuminated with a futuristic interface. Branding and technical details are visible on the back panel, adding to its utilitarian appearance.
description: A rugged, black laptop with a high-tech illuminated display, robust keyboard, and reinforced industrial design, featuring visible wiring and a large rear vent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated screen with digital interface panels, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's thickness, reinforced corners, and visible wiring near the hinge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large vent, battery compartment, branding, and exposed wiring.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the laptop's profile, keyboard, and additional wiring near the hinge.
attribute_brand_logo: The back panel displays a 'DELL' logo in uppercase letters, located in the upper left quadrant, with the model 'LATITUDE 2077' printed below it.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a futuristic digital interface with multiple panels and a central circular graphic.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a full function row, standard alphanumeric keys, and a visible touchpad; no numeric keypad is present.
